The '''Cadriaan Embassy''' on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]], in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]], was located on [[Estalle Island]]. It was a large building constructed in the contemporary [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]] style, simplistic of [[House Cadriaan]]'s progressive attitude. The embassy was protected by an all-[[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] security detail.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
